phrases.intent_en: Ask a local for the best place to eat cassoulet nearby
phrases.text_local: Où me conseilleriez-vous de manger un cassoulet dans ce quartier ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo muh kohn-say-RYAY-voo duh mahn-ZHAY un kah-soo-LAY dahn suh kar-TYAY
phrases.cultural_note: The centre of Toulouse has dozens of restaurants serving cassoulet; locals will always point you away from tourist traps toward authentic spots.

responses.english: I recommend Le Bibent or Chez Plumeau.
responses.phonetic: OO ES suh KON puh MAH(n)ZH uh(n) BON KAH-soo-leh P
responses.french: Je vous recommande Le Bibent ou Chez Plumeau.

phrases.intent_en: Ask which street leads to the pedestrian shopping district
phrases.text_local: Quelle rue mène à la zone piétonne commerçante ?
phrases.pronunciation: kel RYU MEN ah lah ZOHN pyay-TON koh-mair-SAHNT
phrases.cultural_note: The area between the Capitole and the Carmes has a dense network of pedestrian shopping streets and boutiques.

responses.english: It’s between the Capitole and the Carmes.
responses.phonetic: OO sohn lay RUE pyay-TON kom-ers-SAHNT
responses.french: C’est entre le Capitole et les Carmes.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where to find the tourist office for a city map
phrases.text_local: Où se trouve l'office de tourisme pour obtenir un plan de la ville ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo suh TROOV loh-FEES duh toor-EEZM poor ob-tuh-NEER un PLAHN duh lah VEEL
phrases.cultural_note: The Toulouse tourist office is located on the Donjon du Capitole and provides free maps, guided walk booklets, and event information.

responses.english: The tourist office is right opposite the Capitole.
responses.phonetic: OO suh TROOV loh-FEES duh too-REESM poor op-tuh-NEER uhn / uhn PLAHN duh lah VEEL
responses.french: L'office de tourisme est juste en face du Capitole.

phrases.intent_en: Ask for a recommendation for a violet-flavoured sweet or product
phrases.text_local: Pourriez-vous me recommander une spécialité à la violette de Toulouse ?
phrases.pronunciation: poo-RYAY-voo muh ruh-koh-mahn-DAY yoon spay-syah-lee-TAY ah lah vyoh-LET duh too-LOOZ
phrases.cultural_note: The violet is Toulouse's floral symbol; violet-flavoured sweets, liqueurs, and cosmetics are sold throughout the city centre as souvenirs.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the nearest bike-share station is
phrases.text_local: Où se trouve la borne VélôToulouse la plus proche ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo suh TROOV lah BORN vay-loh-too-LOOZ lah plyoo PROSH
phrases.cultural_note: VélôToulouse is the city's public bike-share scheme with hundreds of stations; a short-term pass can be purchased at the terminal.

responses.english: The nearest station is right behind you, on rue Lafayette.
responses.phonetic: OO suh TROOV la BORN VAY-loh-too-LOOZ la PLEW PROSH
responses.french: La borne la plus proche se trouve juste derrière vous, rue Lafayette.
